creator: danny@dannywarren.com
text:
Created attachment 159684
cnagios-0.32.patch

Hello!  I've just released cnagios-0.32 via github.  Attached is a patch to bump the revision and distinfo.

This is the first release of cnagios since moving it over to github, and should hopefully fix most of the major issues that were preventing people from using cnagios.

Changes in cnagios-0.32:

  * Fix several causes of segfaults

  * Fix for incorrect duration and last change values on services

  * Small visual tweak to prevent description and plugin output from looking cluttered when the plugin output is long

  * Source moved from noc.hep.wisc.edu to github: https://github.com/dannywarren/cnagios
